description:
Account for Tammuz and Av 1494 sel. ca. 1183. Only the revenue part of this account is presevred. It contains the sums from 22 apartments and compouns, the total being 374 dirhams, to which 15 dirhams are added, from the account of the preceding month, all of which is to be handed over by the parnas. (Information from Gil, Documents, pp. 342 #86)
Written by Shemuel b. Saadya. AA

Cf. T-S Ar.29.130 (PGPID 41339)
tags: account, 12th c, waqf, qodesh, Shemuel b. Saadya, communal
description_he: חשבון לתמוז ואב 1494 לשטרות (כ-1183). הכנסות מ-22 דיירים ומתחמים: 374 דרהם, בתוספת 15 מהחשבון הקודם. נכתב בידי שמואל בן סעדיה.
